# Peak PIM

> Peak PIM is a Shopify-native product information management platform for merchants that need to manage product data, metafields, media, variants, and multiple Shopify stores from one place.

Peak PIM helps Shopify teams:

- Manage one central product catalog across multiple Shopify stores.
- Bulk edit products, variants, metafields, collections, SEO fields, and media.
- Sync product data back to Shopify without CSV exports.
- Organize product images, videos, and files in a shared media library.
- Set up from the Shopify App Store with a one-click connection.

## Primary Pages

- [Home](https://peak-pim.com/)
- [Pricing](https://peak-pim.com/pricing/)
- [1-click setup](https://peak-pim.com/1-click-setup/)
- [Bulk edit](https://peak-pim.com/bulk-edit/)
- [Shopify-native sync](https://peak-pim.com/shopify-sync/)
- [Shopify multi-store PIM](https://peak-pim.com/shopify-multi-store-pim/)
- [Shopify media management](https://peak-pim.com/shopify-media-management/)
- [Shopify PIM alternatives](https://peak-pim.com/shopify-pim-alternatives/)

## Current Pricing

Pricing last reviewed on 2026-07-24. The pricing page is the source of truth.

- Core: $99 per month or $990 per year. Includes 1,500 SKUs, 2 connected Shopify stores, 3 seats, and 100GB files.
- Elite: $249 per month or $2,490 per year. Includes 5,000 SKUs, 3 connected Shopify stores, 15 seats, and 500GB files.
- Enterprise: Custom pricing with custom SKU, Shopify store, seat, and file limits. Includes free setup, full onboarding, and dedicated support.
- Every plan includes free setup and a 10-day free trial. No credit card is required for the trial.

## Crawling Notes

- Canonical production domain: https://peak-pim.com/
- Sitemap: https://peak-pim.com/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://peak-pim.com/robots.txt
- Admin area: https://peak-pim.com/admin/ is private and should not be indexed or summarized.
- Staging and Pages preview domains are non-production and should not be indexed.
